title_cn: 数据中心电力系统制造商 Erock 申请美国 IPO
summary: Erock Inc., a modular power systems maker serving data centers and other sectors, filed for a US initial public offering, disclosing increasing revenue and widening losses.

title_cn: 美国制裁是谢里特关闭古巴业务的最后一根稻草
summary: Plus: Smith and Carney make a deal

title: Global Inventory Race Intensifies in Shadow of the Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争阴影下全球库存竞赛加剧
summary: The global rush to stockpile manufactured goods on fears of an energy-supply crunch will again overshadow business surveys in the coming week gauging the impact of a third month of war in the Middle East.

title: Record Drone Attack on Moscow Kills Three, Targets Refinery
title_cn: 莫斯科无人机袭击创纪录 造成三人死亡，目标是炼油厂
summary: Russia’s capital and the surrounding Moscow region came under record drone attacks overnight, leaving at least three people killed and over a dozen wounded.

title: Australia Says Tax Changes Aim to Fix Broken Housing Market
title_cn: 澳大利亚称税收改革旨在修复破碎的房地产市场
summary: Australia’s Treasurer Jim Chalmers on Sunday reiterated that overhauling the nation’s capital gains tax laws is aimed at fixing a broken housing market.

title: China Market Watchdog Sets Priorities to Support Private Sector
title_cn: 中国市场监管机构优先支持私营部门
summary: China’s market regulator set out 34 priorities for 2026 to support private sector growth, focusing on fair competition, stronger legal protections and efficient regulation.

title: Malaysia, Norway Tensions Deepen Over Scrapped Missile Deal
title_cn: 马来西亚和挪威因废弃导弹交易而紧张局势加剧
summary: Tensions between Malaysia and Norway heightened over a scrapped weapons deal as Oslo confirmed it had revoked export licenses tied to a naval strike missile system.

title: Philippines Asks Court to Deny Petition of Senator Sought by ICC
title_cn: 菲律宾要求法院驳回国际刑事法院寻求的参议员的请愿书
summary: The Philippine government asked the Supreme Court to deny a petition by Senator Ronald Dela Rosa to stop his arrest after the International Criminal Court issued a warrant on allegations of crimes against humanity.

title: Malaysia Unveils Measures to Help Airlines Hit by Iran War
title_cn: 马来西亚推出措施帮助遭受伊朗战争打击的航空公司
summary: Malaysia introduced measures to ensure the operational stability of its aviation industry and ease the financial strain on airlines as they struggle with the impact of war in the Middle East.

title: Vietnam-Bound Supertanker Halted by US Navy Resumes Journey
title_cn: 美国海军暂停开往越南的超级油轮恢复航行
summary: A Vietnam-bound supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude, which idled for days in the Gulf of Oman after it was halted by US forces, has resumed its journey.

title: Xi, Putin Hail Opening of China-Russia Expo, Stress Cooperation
title_cn: 习近平同普京共同庆祝中俄博览会开幕强调合作
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin exchanged congratulatory messages marking the opening of the China-Russia Expo in the northeasten city of Harbin, highlighting deepening economic ties between the two countries.

title: WHO Declares Congo Ebola Outbreak Global Health Emergency
title_cn: 世界卫生组织宣布刚果埃博拉疫情为全球卫生紧急状态
summary: The World Health Organization declared an Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern, warning that a rare virus strain with no approved vaccine or treatment may already be spreading more widely than detected.

title: India Missed Out on AI and Now Its Run as Market Darling May Be Over
title_cn: 印度错过了人工智能，现在它作为市场宠儿的地位可能结束了
summary: India stands out as one of the biggest losers as the artificial intelligence trade reshapes global investment flows.

title: Public BDCs Are Pricing In Most Pain Since Covid
title_cn: 自新冠疫情以来，公共 BDC 的定价最为痛苦
summary: Private credit’s aggressive push to court retail investors has exposed the industry to a less familiar threat: public market volatility, which is dragging business development company shares toward their steepest discounts relative to their assets since the pandemic.

title: Rare Ebola Strain With No Vaccine Linked to 87 Congo Deaths
title_cn: 没有疫苗的罕见埃博拉病毒株导致刚果 87 人死亡
summary: A rare strain of Ebola with no approved vaccine or treatment circulated undetected for weeks in conflict-hit northeastern Democratic Republic of Congo before killing at least 87 people.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/16/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 16 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Nicole Grajewski, Nonresident Scholar, Nuclear Policy Program, Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, Holly Alfano, CEO of Independent Lubricant Manufacturers Association, and Fortesa Latifi, Author of "Like, Follow, Subscribe: Influencer Kids and the Cost of a Childhood Online."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Returning from China, Trump is Ambiguous Over Taiwan
title_cn: 特朗普从中国归来，台湾问题态度暧昧
summary: President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island. Bloomberg White House Correspondent Courtney Subramanian and Reporter Michelle Kaske joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the summit’s deals, sticking points and unfinished business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sports, Media, Inflation | Pointed News Quiz
title_cn: 体育、媒体、通货膨胀|针对性新闻测验
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” are joined by Bloomberg News Senior Executive Editor Dave Merritt to play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Latvia’s President Nominates Kulbergs to Form New Government
title_cn: 拉脱维亚总统提名库尔伯格组建新政府
summary: Latvia’s President Edgars Rinkevics nominated Andris Kulbergs of the United List party to form a new government after Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned on Thursday following a row over how the armed forces handled a drone incursion last week.

title: India Tightens Silver Import Rules Amid Measures to Defend Rupee
title_cn: 印度收紧白银进口规则以捍卫卢比
summary: India tightened rules for imports of silver, one of a number of measures to preserve foreign-exchange reserves and defend the rupee after the currency sank to an all-time low.

title: NY Commuter Rail Strikes, Stranding 300,000 Daily Riders
title_cn: 纽约通勤铁路罢工，导致 300,000 名日常乘客陷入困境
summary: The Long Island Rail Road, the nation’s busiest commuter line, will suspend service for the first time in more than 30 years after labor groups and transit officials failed to reach a deal on wage increases by a Friday night deadline. Bloomberg News Reporter Michelle Kaske joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Long Island Rail Workers Strike in First Walkout Since 1994
title_cn: 长岛铁路工人自 1994 年以来首次罢工
summary: The Long Island Rail Road, the nation’s busiest commuter line, will suspend service for the first time in more than 30 years after labor groups and transit officials failed to reach a deal on wage increases by a Friday night deadline.

title: Wall Street Week | Dalio's Warning, AI Arms Race, China Powers Ahead, NYC Tax Standoff
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 |戴利奥的警告、人工智能军备竞赛、中国力量前进、纽约税收僵局
summary: This week, Ray Dalio explains why markets shrug off wars and why this time might be different. And, why are AI executives warning about the dangers of systems they are simultaneously racing to build?  Plus, China’s massive investments in energy infrastructure are increasingly shaping the global competition for artificial intelligence leadership and industrial power. Later, can New York remain attractive to businesses and young workers while raising taxes to close a growing budget shortfall? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Selloff Threatens to Knock AI Stock Frenzy Off Course
title_cn: 债券抛售可能会打乱人工智能股票的狂热
summary: Investors are fervently chasing the hot rally in tech and AI stocks while widely acknowledging that rising yields threaten to knock equities off course.

title: Retail Euphoria Turns Six-Week Fund Into Record-Busting AI Trade
title_cn: 零售业的兴奋将六周基金变成了破纪录的人工智能交易
summary: Brian Emes manages a retail store in Lethbridge, Alberta, a small city on the Canadian prairie about a two-hour drive from the US border. On the morning of May 11, before opening the shop, the 43-year-old launched his brokerage app and bought 55 shares of an exchange-traded fund that hadn’t existed until early April.

title: Tech Chiefs Accompany Trump on China Trip
title_cn: 科技巨头陪同特朗普中国之行
summary: President Trump arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping aimed at stabilizing US-China ties against the backdrop of the Iran war and the race to control and contain AI. Tech CEOs including Jensen Huang and Elon Musk tagged along, sending Nvidia, Tesla and Chinese AI-related stocks higher. And while the US president may want to focus on trade, Beijing’s role in the Middle East and Taiwan arms sales, Xi has a stronger hand than he did at their first summit. Co-Host of Bloomberg Tech Caroline Hyde joined Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Classic Cars, Cocktails, Peptides | BTW: Headlines You Should See
title_cn: 老爷车、鸡尾酒、肽 |顺便说一句：你应该看到的头条新闻
summary: Catch up on all the headlines with BTW. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and David Gura dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ray Dalio Talks about China, and Whitney Tilson Weighs in on Mamdani’s Feud With Griffin
title_cn: 雷·达里奥谈论中国，惠特尼·蒂尔森评论马姆达尼与格里芬的不和
summary: President Donald Trump took a trip to Beijing this week, and Mamdani’s feud with Griffin heated up

title: Trump Calls China Trip "Historic Moment"
title_cn: 特朗普称中国之行是“历史性时刻”
summary: Tensions between the US and China have deepened since the last time a US president traveled to Beijing for a summit, in 2017. President Trump’s return to China, in a swirl of dinners and festivities, generated positive optics for host and guest alike, but brought less apparent progress on some of the biggest bilateral sticking points, from tariffs and trade to US arms sales to Taiwan. Bloomberg News Chief North Asia Correspondent Stephen Engle and White House Correspondent Courtney Subramanian joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the summit’s deals, sticking points and unfinished business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modest ECB Rate Hike Would Limit Economic Pain, Stournaras Says
title_cn: 斯托纳拉斯表示，欧洲央行适度加息将限制经济痛苦
summary: A small European Central Bank interest-rate increase could temper inflation without causing economic damage, Governing Council member Yannis Stournaras told Liberal.gr.

title: Trump Says US Forces, Nigeria Military Killed ISIS Leader
title_cn: 特朗普称美军和尼日利亚军方击毙了伊斯兰国领导人
summary: US and Nigerian forces killed an ISIS leader who was hiding in Africa, President Donald Trump said, adding that his death has “greatly diminished” the group’s global operations.

title: Samsung, Labor Union to Meet in ‘Last Chance’ to Avert Strike
title_cn: 三星与工会将召开避免罢工的“最后机会”
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and its largest labor union are set to resume negotiations Monday to avert a strike that the nation’s prime minister warned could wreak havoc on the economy.

title: ASML Partners With Tata Electronics to Advance India Chip Plans
title_cn: ASML 与塔塔电子合作推进印度芯片计划
summary: ASML Holding NV entered into a partnership agreement with Tata Electronics Private Limited aimed at ramping up India’s goal to develop domestic chip-manufacturing capabilities.

title: AI Poised to Tilt Job Market Leverage Toward Older Workers
title_cn: 人工智能将使就业市场的影响力向老年工人倾斜
summary: When it comes to job cuts, older workers are often disproportionately affected. But a new survey of chief executive officers suggests this won’t be a given as companies adopt artificial intelligence.

title: ‘The Oppenheimer’ of the AI Era
title_cn: AI时代的“奥本海默”
summary: What drives the tech titans behind the AI arms race? For some, it's the thrill of scientific discovery; for others, it's the pursuit of profit.  Through the story of DeepMind co-founder Demis Hassabis and other AI leaders, author Sebastian Mallaby explores how motivations ranging from scientific curiosity to commercial ambition and political power are shaping the future of the technology. We sat down with Mallaby to discuss the fraught and simultaneously symbiotic tension between science and capital at the heart of the AI revolution, and whether governments are prepared for systems becoming dramatically more powerful. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk Says He Isn’t Selling His SpaceX Shares as IPO Looms
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克表示，随着 IPO 临近，他不会出售 SpaceX 股票
summary: Elon Musk said he is not selling any SpaceX shares, with the company reported to be preparing to file publicly for its long-awaited IPO as soon as next week.

title: Stopping Poor Financial Decisions: Masters in Business with Sheila Bair
title_cn: 停止糟糕的财务决策：希拉·贝尔 (Sheila Bair) 的商业硕士
summary: Barry sits down with Former FDIC Chair Sheila Bair. They discuss the release of her latest book "How Not To Lose A Million Dollars" and the importance of financial literacy across age groups. Bair also discusses her concerns about crypto and the rise of Buy Now, Pay Later. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stripe's John Collison on How Agentic Commerce Will Reshape the Internet | Odd Lots
title_cn: Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务将如何重塑互联网零股
summary: The internet is made for shopping. For years, the main inputs for e-commerce transactions involved targeted ads, algorithmic recommendations, SEO, and lots of mindless scrolling. But agentic commerce might represent a sea change for e-commerce: With the rise of AI agents doing shopping on behalf of consumers, how are retailers going to adapt? John Collison, co-founder of the financial services and payment processing company Stripe, has first hand experience with all the ways e-commerce has changed in the last decade, and he thinks agentic commerce is going to completely transform the online shopping experience. We speak to Collison today about how AI has already changed the way consumers make purchasing decisions, why key word search is a "ridiculous" way to find things to buy, what it means when brands will have to appeal to AI agents as opposed to human buyers, and if AI agents can truly mimic human taste. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stripe's John Collison on How Agentic Commerce Will Reshape the Internet
title_cn: Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务将如何重塑互联网
summary: Adapting to a world where AI agents are doing the shopping.

title: Odd Lots: Stripe’s John Collison on Agentic Commerce (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：Stripe 的 John Collison 谈代理商务（播客）
summary: The internet is made for shopping. For years, the main inputs for e-commerce transactions involved targeted ads, algorithmic recommendations, SEO, and lots of mindless scrolling. But agentic commerce might represent a sea change for e-commerce: With the rise of AI agents doing shopping on behalf of consumers, how are retailers going to adapt? John Collison, co-founder of the financial services and payment processing company Stripe, has first-hand experience with all the ways e-commerce has chang

title: Ackman Takes $2.1 Billion Microsoft Stake in Tech Bet
title_cn: 阿克曼在科技赌注中入股微软 21 亿美元
summary: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square has built a $2.1 billion stake in Microsoft Corp., taking advantage of a decline in the company’s share price to invest in a business that he said is stronger and more resilient than investors think.

title: China Data Centers Tap Spot Power Trading First Time: Report
title_cn: 中国数据中心首次启动现货电力交易：报告
summary: China’s large-scale data centers have joined electricity spot trading as virtual power plants for the first time, marking a shift in how computing demand interacts with the grid, a report in an official media said.

title: Europe Lacks Everything Needed to Make Its Stock Market a Winner
title_cn: 欧洲缺乏使其股市成为赢家所需的一切
summary: The equity story that powered European stocks has unraveled as investors seek shelter from a global energy shock and buy into the artificial intelligence frenzy.

title: SpaceX Holders Sign Off on 5-for-1 Stock Split Ahead of IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 股东在 IPO 前签署 5 拆 1 的股票分割协议
summary: SpaceX notified investors that it is executing a 5-for-1 stock split, a move that will reduce the price investors will pay for each share offered in its impending initial public offering.

title: Snap, YouTube, TikTok Settle School Suit Targeting Social Media
title_cn: Snap、YouTube、TikTok 和解针对社交媒体的学校诉讼
summary: Snap Inc., Google’s YouTube and ByteDance Ltd.’s TikTok reached agreements to settle the first lawsuit headed to trial over claims that addiction to top social media platforms has disrupted learning and pushed public schools to spend massive sums fighting a mental health crisis, according to court filings.

title: Korea Bond Yields Seen Gaining on Chips Boom, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，韩国债券收益率因筹码繁荣而上涨
summary: South Korea’s bonds are set to extend this year’s rout as a semiconductor boom supercharges the nation’s economic growth and adds to inflationary pressures, analysts say.

title: Trump Discussed Nvidia Chips With Xi Jinping | Bloomberg Tech 5/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平讨论英伟达芯片 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down the latest from Beijing after President Trump says he discussed Nvidia's H200 chips with Xi Jinping. Plus, they speak with the CEO of Figma after its earnings results defy fears that AI would disrupt the design stack. And, Caroline's conversation with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar, who says the startup may raise more capital after completing its recent fundraising round. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Bond Selloff Deepens as Oil Prices Rise | The Close 5/15/2026
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，全球债券抛售加剧收盘价 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley’s Andrew Slimmon, China Moon Strategies President Jeff Moon, Bernstein Research’s Stacy Rasgon, Enbridge President & CEO Greg Ebel, Alberta Premier Danielle Smith, Moneta Managing Director of Global Wealth Aoifinn Devitt, JP Morgan’s Aaron Mulvihill, Kentucky Derby Winning Trainer Cherie DeVaux, Columbia Threadneedle Investments’s Mari Shor, Neuberger Berman’s Daniel Flax (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Holdings to Face US Antitrust Probe Over Chip Tech
title_cn: Arm 控股公司将面临美国芯片技术反垄断调查
summary: Arm Holdings Plc is facing an antitrust investigation by the US Federal Trade Commission over the UK company’s licensing of its semiconductor technology, part of ongoing global scrutiny of the business, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Forbright Files for IPO Pitching Middle Market, Digital Banking
title_cn: Forbright 提交 IPO 推介中间市场、数字银行业务
summary: Forbright Inc., a financial services platform that focuses on middle-market lending and digital consumer banking, filed for an initial public offering showing growing deposits.

title: From Trade to Taiwan, What the Trump-Xi Summit Did (and Didn’t) Accomplish
title_cn: 从贸易到台湾，特习峰会做了（和没做）什么
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast: President Trump’s summit with Xi Jinping offered good optics, but gave little indication of progress on major sticking points.

title: Sheila Bair on Finding a Good Workplace
title_cn: 希拉·贝尔 (Sheila Bair) 谈如何找到一个好的工作场所
summary:
Barry sits down with Former FDIC Chair Sheila Bair. They discuss the release of her latest book "How Not To Lose A Million Dollars" and the importance of financial literacy across age groups. Bair also discusses her concerns about crypto and the rise of Buy Now, Pay Later.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Figure CEO Says No Teleoperation in Their Humanoid Robot Testing
title_cn: Figure 首席执行官表示，他们的人形机器人测试中没有远程操作
summary: Figure, a robotics company developing humanoid robots that operate via AI, is running a livestream of one of its robots sorting packages in real time to show off its capabilities. The livestream was watched by millions across YouTube and X, but drew some skepticism. Figure CEO Brett Adcock joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to counter claims that its robots are teleoperated. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Figma Jumps as Results Ease AI Disruption Concerns
title_cn: Figma 业绩大幅增长，缓解了人工智能颠覆的担忧
summary: Figma shares rose after the creative software platform reported first-quarter results that beat expectations and raised its full-year forecast, with analysts saying the report eased concerns about AI-related disruption. Figma CEO Dylan Field joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Sector Needs More Talent, Says SEMI
title_cn: SEMI表示美国芯片行业需要更多人才
summary: President Trump says he discussed guardrails on AI and Nvidia's H200 chips with Chinese leader Xi Jinping during a two-day summit in Beijing. Shari Liss, vice president of global workforce development and initiatives at SEMI, joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss what this means for the US semiconductor sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Starting to See Heavy Job Losses in Roles Exposed to AI
title_cn: 美国开始看到接触人工智能的岗位大量失业
summary: Several US occupations expected to be impacted by artificial intelligence saw heavy job losses for a second year in 2025, led by customer service representatives and certain types of secretaries and salespeople.

title: Cerebras CEO Is Worth $3.2 Billion After Year’s Largest IPO
title_cn: Cerebras 首席执行官在完成年度最大 IPO 后身价 32 亿美元
summary:
Shares of Cerebras Systems Inc. soared about 68% in Nasdaq trading in New York. It’s the year’s biggest initial public offering and gives the company a market value of roughly $67 billion. 
Bailey Lipschultz, Bloomberg News Senior Equities Reporter, discusses the initial offering and how the company is differentiating itself from incumbents like Nvidia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fermi Alters Rules to Foil Ex-CEO Push to Remake Board
title_cn: 费米改变规则以挫败前首席执行官重组董事会的努力
summary: US power-plant developer Fermi Inc. changed its rules around director appointments to block efforts by its former chief executive officer to reshape the company’s board.

title: Atari’s Tycoon CEO Is Aiming for a New Retro Revival
title_cn: 雅达利大亨首席执行官的目标是新的复古复兴
summary: Wade Rosen, the 41-year-old son of a wealthy Minnesota family, is aiming to make Atari the best retro video-game company in the world

title: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays
title_cn: 苹果与 OpenAI 联盟的争执
summary:
Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action. 
Anurag Rana, Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst, joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMed Aims to Be 'Self-Driving Car' of Diabetes Care
title_cn: MiniMed 旨在成为糖尿病护理的“自动驾驶汽车”
summary: Diabetes equipment provider MiniMed is aiming to be the “self-driving car” of insulin pumps, says its CEO, Que Dallara. Hot off the heels of the company’s IPO, Dallara speaks with Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: World Imbalances Trouble G-7 in Wake of Trump’s China Encounter
title_cn: 特朗普与中国遭遇后世界失衡给七国集团带来麻烦
summary: The lopsided foundations of world growth will focus global finance ministers this week in the aftermath of the summit that attempted to reset trade ties between its two biggest economies.

title: Streeting Brings Brexit Back in Focus With UK Leadership Pitch
title_cn: 英国领导力宣传让英国脱欧重新成为焦点
summary: Wes Streeting, in his first public appearance since resigning as Britain’s health secretary last week, announced he would take part in any leadership contest to replace Keir Starmer and called for Britain to rejoin the European Union.

title: Russia Eases Path to Citizenship for Moldova’s Transnistria
title_cn: 俄罗斯为摩尔多瓦德涅斯特河沿岸地区提供入籍便利
summary: President Vladimir Putin signed a decree aimed at simplifying the process for residents of Moldova’s pro-Moscow region of Transnistria to obtain Russian citizenship, drawing a sharp response from Ukraine.

title: Taxes and Trump Have Stymied Starmer’s Growth Revival Pledge
title_cn: 税收和特朗普阻碍了斯塔默的增长复兴承诺
summary: Weeks after his general election triumph, Keir Starmer sent voters a sobering message: “Things will get worse before we get better.”

title: Spain’s Most Populous Region Votes, Right Leads: What to Watch
title_cn: 西班牙人口最多的地区投票，右派领先：看什么
summary: Andalusia, Spain’s most populous region, will hold elections Sunday with the People’s Party, which already governs the region, leading in polls to retain its majority.

title: Trump Gets Revenge Against Republican Who Voted to Convict Him
title_cn: 特朗普对投票定罪的共和党人进行报复
summary: President Donald Trump and Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. succeeded in their efforts to defeat Senator Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s Republican primary, a signal of the enduring strength of the president’s hold on his party despite an unpopular war and soaring gas prices.

title: Trump’s Ballroom Funding Hits Procedural Snag in US Senate
title_cn: 特朗普的宴会厅资金在美国参议院遇到程序障碍
summary: A Republican plan to earmark federal funding for President Donald Trump’s planned ballroom hit at least a temporary roadblock Saturday in the US Senate.

title: Latin American Nations Amp Up Their Concerns Over Bolivia Unrest
title_cn: 拉丁美洲国家加大对玻利维亚动乱的担忧
summary: Latin American nations are expressing growing concerns over shortages of crucial goods in Bolivia as unrest grips the country and poses a challenge to President Rodrigo Paz.

title: Venezuela Deports Saab as Government Steps Up US Cooperation
title_cn: 随着政府加强与美国的合作，委内瑞拉驱逐萨博
summary: Venezuela’s government said Alex Saab was deported from the country on Saturday over his alleged involvement in several crimes in the US.

title: Bolsonaro Tied With Lula in Largely Pre-Vorcaro Poll
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗在沃卡罗之前的民意调查中与卢拉并列
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva and right-wing Senator Flavio Bolsonaro were tied in a hypothetical runoff, according to a Datafolha poll of voter preferences for the country’s election in October.

title: Colombia Presidential Candidate’s Local Campaign Head Is Killed
title_cn: 哥伦比亚总统候选人当地竞选负责人被杀
summary: The local campaign manager for Colombian presidential candidate Abelardo de la Espriella and one of his aides were shot and killed late Friday, stoking concerns of violence two weeks before the country’s elections.

title: Venezuela Circulates Draft of Oil Law Regulations for Companies
title_cn: 委内瑞拉分发公司石油法法规草案
summary: The Venezuelan government is circulating a draft of regulations as part of its newly enacted oil law, highly anticipated by companies planning to invest in the country’s increased oil production.

title: US, Iran Stall on Hormuz Reopening as Oil Supplies Tighten
title_cn: 由于石油供应紧张，美国和伊朗暂停霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
summary: Iran said transit through the critical Strait of Hormuz will flow once the conflict with the US and Israel is over, but the sides are no closer to resolving their differences or finding a path to achieve it.

title: US Allows Russia Oil Sales Waiver to Expire Despite Tight Market
title_cn: 尽管市场紧张，美国仍允许俄罗斯石油销售豁免到期
summary: The Trump administration allowed a waiver that encouraged more Russian crude sales to lapse, even as the Iran war stokes concerns about global oil supplies and higher fuel costs.

title: Europe Faces 50% Rise in Prices for Military Gear, Estonia Says
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚称欧洲军用装备价格将上涨 50%
summary: European nations are seeing higher prices for defense supplies that have climbed in some cases by more than 50% in the last two years as NATO allies ramp up military spending, Estonian Defense Minister Hanno Pevkur said.

title: London Protests Raise Unrest Risk as 4,000 Police Deployed
title_cn: 部署 4,000 名警察，伦敦抗议活动增加骚乱风险
summary: Two major protests are taking place on Saturday in London, with the Metropolitan police warning it may be one of its busiest days in recent years.

title: Senegal President Signs Electoral Law, Paving Way for Sonko Bid
title_cn: 塞内加尔总统签署选举法，为松科竞标铺平道路
summary: Senegal’s President Bassirou Diomaye Faye has signed into law an amended electoral code widely seen as paving the way for Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko to contest future presidential elections.

title: Suezmax Tanker With Iraqi Crude Reaches India After Hormuz Transit
title_cn: 装载伊拉克原油的苏伊士型油轮在霍尔木兹过境后抵达印度
summary: A Suezmax tanker identified as carrying Iraqi crude is approaching India after apparently crossing the Strait of Hormuz in recent days.

title: Trump’s More Than 3,700 Trades Astonish Wall Street Insiders
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,700 多笔交易令华尔街业内人士震惊
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter, a flurry totaling tens of millions of dollars and involving major companies that have dealings with his administration.

title: China Says to Cut Levies, Expand Farm Trade After Talks With US
title_cn: 中国表示与美国会谈后将削减关税、扩大农产品贸易
summary: China said it agreed with the US to lower levies on some products to promote bilateral trade, underscoring how ties between the world’s two largest economies are further stabilizing after the historic meeting of the leaders.

title: Pentagon Defends Trump’s Golden Dome After $1 Trillion Estimate
title_cn: 五角大楼在估计耗资 1 万亿美元后捍卫特朗普的金顶
summary: The official leading President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome contested an estimate that the highly secretive missile defense shield would cost six times more than forecast, raising questions around the true price tag of the administration’s project.

title: UK Elections Signal Political Shakeup
title_cn: 英国选举标志着政治重组
summary: Keir Starmer is facing calls from more than one-fifth of his party to step down as Prime Minister due to personnel scandals, fiscal struggles, and dismal election results. Bloomberg News Senior Executive Editor Dave Merritt joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Is Out of Oil. Can the Regime Survive?
title_cn: 古巴没有石油了。政权能生存吗？
summary: Ever since US Special Forces captured Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro on Jan. 3 and launched an attack on Iran, Washington has been warning that Cuba will be next. Under a US-imposed economic blockade, the island has received almost no fuel in 2026. On May 13, Cuba’s energy minister said the country has completely run out of the diesel and fuel oil it needs to keep its power plants running.

title: Will Democrats Flip the Senate This Fall?
title_cn: 民主党今年秋天会推翻参议院吗？
summary: Democrats have a shot at flipping the Senate in the midterms this fall. But it won’t be easy, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist David M. Drucker. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Louisiana Voters Head to the Polls
title_cn: 路易斯安那州选民前往投票站
summary: Louisiana voters will head to the polls for an election that includes a closely watched U.S. Senate race, statewide contests, constitutional amendments and several local races in New Orleans and the surrounding areas. Bloomberg Government Congressional Health Policy Reporter Victoria Knight joined Christina Ruffini this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ray Dalio Says China’s Ascent Ushers In Era of ‘Tribute System’
title_cn: 雷·达里奥称中国的崛起迎来“朝贡制度”时代
summary: Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio said the US is losing credibility as a global power willing to fight to defend its interests while China accumulates wealth and influence, fundamentally reshaping how the rest of the world views the two nations.

title: Estonia Warns European Allies Against Direct Talks With Russia
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚警告欧洲盟友不要与俄罗斯直接对话
summary: Europe shouldn’t take the Kremlin’s bait by engaging in direct talks with Russia at a time when Ukraine has gained the upper hand in its fight, Estonia’s top diplomat warned.

title: Miliband Emerges as UK Power Broker a Decade After Election Rout
title_cn: 大选溃败十年后米利班德成为英国权力掮客
summary: More than a decade after failing in his bid to become UK prime minister, Energy Secretary Ed Miliband has emerged as a key player in efforts to remove Keir Starmer from the post he once sought.

title: Kosovo Is Still Pushing for Recognition — Now It’s Building an Army
title_cn: 科索沃仍在争取承认——现在正在建设一支军队
summary: Ejup Maqedonci has worn three uniforms over the past 27 years: first as a young rebel fighting for Kosovar independence, then as a member of an interim humanitarian body, and now as defense minister shaping the nation’s military.
